steps.title: Use the shortcoming context
steps.content: The text says earlier income-inequality research had a shortcoming: a narrow focus on a few countries because of limited data. Later, researchers gained access to records in countries in Africa and Eastern Europe. The blank needs a word meaning they would make that shortcoming better.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong meanings
steps.content: Choice A, “postulate,” means propose. Choice C, “sanction,” means approve or penalize, neither of which fits fixing a shortcoming. Choice D, “rationalize,” means justify. The word meaning improve or lessen a problem fits. The answer is B.
